title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers (via proxy).

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: First-class LangChain integration; drop-in LLM, chat, and embeddings interface for any Ollama model.

title: LlamaIndex Ollama integration
summary: Use Ollama models as the LLM or embedding backend in LlamaIndex RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat-style Web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI); import models, share chats, multi-user.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with fuzzy-find model picker, conversation history, and REPL.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Lightweight proxy that turns Ollama into a GitHub Copilot-compatible completion provider for VS Code & JetBrains.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate, refactor, and chat with Ollama models without leaving the editor.

title: ollama-codex
summary: Experimental open-source clone of GitHub Copilot using Ollama for code completion inside VS Code.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal Flask/Svelte chat app that streams Ollama responses and stores history in SQLite.

title: ollama-agents
summary: Lightweight framework for running ReAct & conversational agents backed by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-embeddings
summary: Utility repo demonstrating how to generate embeddings with Ollama and feed them to vector DBs like Chroma & Qdrant.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat interface that supports multiple concurrent Ollama sessions and model switching.

title: ollama-dbee
summary: Dbee SQL client plugin that lets you ask natural-language questions and generates SQL via Ollama.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Simple RAG pipeline using Ollama for both embeddings and generation; includes Gradio UI.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Bolt-based Slack bot that streams Ollama answers in threads and supports app mentions.

title: ollama-mirror
summary: Community effort to host and sync Ollama model blobs for faster downloads in regions with limited bandwidth.
